summary: The diff modifies GroupChatPage.tsx to implement a searchable contact list for adding group members, importing useGetConversations and adding Search/ChevronDown/Check icons. The implementation appears to replace the principal-ID text input with a contact-based UI. However, the diff is truncated and we cannot fully verify all acceptance criteria from the visible code alone. Based on what is visible, the core REQ-1 implementation is underway with the right imports and component structure, but full verification of all ACs is limited by truncation.
